text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see, so it's like the saying goes, "the<n>dirt is
always stronger on the other side."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I write sayings in my Chiyonotes.<n>The little
insights I have every day might<n>be useful
someday!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that's my proverb. Feel free to<n>write that
one down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, thank... Wait. Don't speed and<n>velocity
mean the same thing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Speed is what you gain from<n>training.
Velocity, you have to work up<n>to through
exercise!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I see! I'd better write that down! "Speed<n>is..."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I feel like training and exercise<n>also mean the
same thing here...
